events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "CSST gas line is not bonded to the electrical grounding system as required",
    "Missing bonding connection creates a risk of arcing or fire if the CSST becomes energized"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a listed bonding clamp on the CSST per manufacturer instructions",
    "Connect bonding conductor to the equipment grounding conductor or grounding electrode system per NEC 250.104(B)",
    "Verify bond size is adequate for the fault current available, typically not smaller than 6 AWG copper"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104(B) requires bonding of metal gas piping systems that are likely to become energized. CSST is specifically listed as requiring bonding per its manufacturer's instructions and NEC. Failure to bond the CSST in a rough-complete inspection is a code violation and creates a fire and shock hazard, warranting a fail decision and high risk.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104(B)", "CSST manufacturer installation instructions", "NEC 250.30 (for grounding electrode conductor sizing reference)"]
}
